title: Agency Meeting Assistant
concept: An AI assistant for boutique agencies that turns messy meeting notes into client-ready summaries, follow-up emails, and internal task plans.
additional_context: Optimize for time-to-value within one session.

title: Meal Planning Subscription
concept: A mobile subscription app for busy parents that turns dietary goals, school schedules, and grocery budgets into flexible weekly meal plans.
additional_context: Consumer subscription with strong repeat usage.

title: Local Repair Marketplace
concept: A marketplace that helps homeowners compare vetted repair professionals, manage quotes, and convert decisions into booked jobs faster.
additional_context: Launch in one city first and emphasize trust.

title: Clinic Compliance Assistant
concept: A workflow assistant for small clinics that turns policy updates into staff action plans, documentation checklists, and audit reminders.

title: Freelancer Proposal Copilot
concept: A product for freelancers that turns rough client calls into project scopes, timelines, and proposal drafts they can edit before sending.
additional_context: Single-user product first, team features later.

title: Retail Ops Analytics
concept: A dashboard for multi-location retailers that explains inventory issues, promotion impact, and margin changes in plain language.
additional_context: B2B SaaS for operators, not analysts.

title: Creator Sponsorship CRM
concept: A lightweight CRM for creators that tracks sponsorship outreach, deal status, deliverables, and payment follow-up without enterprise complexity.

title: Hiring Debrief Assistant
concept: A product that helps startup hiring teams turn scattered interview notes into structured debriefs, scorecards, and decision summaries.
additional_context: Must feel useful even before HR integrations exist.

title: Small Law Intake Tool
concept: A client intake assistant for small law firms that turns messy discovery calls into organized intake summaries and next-step checklists.
additional_context: High trust requirements and clear boundaries on legal advice.

title: Property Manager Workflow Copilot
concept: A workflow copilot for property managers that turns maintenance reports, tenant context, and vendor availability into recommended action plans.
